scripts.serve:all: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host --filter=shared-tree-shaking-with-server-provider && pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host run build:re-shake && pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host run serve & pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-provider run serve & pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host run serve:re-shake
scripts.e2e: pnpm exec cypress run --config-file cypress.config.ts --browser chrome --config baseUrl=http://localhost:3001
scripts.e2e:development: pnpm exec cypress open --config-file cypress.config.ts --browser chrome --config baseUrl=http://localhost:3001
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host --filter=shared-tree-shaking-with-server-provider && pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host run build:re-shake && pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host run serve & pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-provider run serve & pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host run serve:re-shake & sleep 10 && pnpm --filter shared-tree-shaking-with-server-host run e2e
